case_title: ROCHELLE FOLES VS. LEON TOPPN et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR MARK EDWARD OIUM APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-18-2011 THROUGH FEB-16-2012.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-20-2011 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY GOROG, STEPHEN J.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-17-2011.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR OIUM, MARK EDWARD
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-15-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. MAR-13-2012 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TOPPN, LEON
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-13-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOLES, ROCHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT TOPPN, LEON DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-02-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-18-2011

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-07-2011. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-20-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. SEP-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOLES, ROCHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOPPN, LEON $125,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $125,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT; AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR DATED FEB-15-2012.
